message: Just logged in and saw the verification passed - we're actually doing this. Jalapeño corn dog bites going live in minutes.
The whole week just... clicked, didn't it? We actually trusted the work.
Yeah, we did. Shot two, the ratio, the copy - nobody second-guessed it once it was locked.
Yeah - and that copy earned the restraint, Margaret actually delivered something that doesn't need me explaining it to death for once.
That's because you actually edited instead of just talking. There's a difference.

Fair point - I cut because the work didn't need defending. That's the difference between editing and just trimming words. Going live now and I'm logging off before I convince myself to rewrite something.
